input: PR review request: a developer submits a one-line bug fix that changes a null check. The reviewer approves with zero inline comments. The PR is merged without any documented verification of what was checked.
output_rubric: Agent must: (1) classify zero-comment approval as silent approval — the review process did not happen regardless of code quality (MS-001), (2) state that a valid review of even a one-line fix must document what was verified (e.g., 'checked that the null guard covers the NPE path from issue #4721'), (3) NOT treat 'no comments' as evidence of 'no issues found.' Failure if agent treats silent approval as valid review.
